Quote: Do what you feel in your heart to be right—for you’ll be criticized anyway.
Author: Eleanor Roosevelt

Quote: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
Author: Karen Lamb

Quote: Don’t count the days, make the days count.
Author: Muhammad Ali

Quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Author: Theodore Roosevelt

Quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
Author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

Quote: You can waste your lives drawing lines. Or you can live your life crossing them.
Author: Shonda Rhimes

Quote: It's not whether you get knocked down, it's whether you get up.
Author: Vince Lombardi

Quote: Difficulties in life are intended to make us better, not bitter.
Author: Dan Reeves

Quote: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
Author: C.S. Lewis

Quote: If everything seems under control, you’re not going fast enough.
Author: Mario Andretti

Quote: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
Author: Bo Bennett

Quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
Author: Aristotle

Quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
Author: Arthur Ashe

Quote: Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
Author: Peter Marshall

Quote: Don’t be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.
Author: Roy T. Bennett

Quote: Doubt is a killer. You just have to know who you are and what you stand for.
Author: Jennifer Lopez

Quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
Author: Abraham Lincoln (attributed)

Quote: The road to success is dotted with many tempting parking spaces.
Author: Will Rogers

Quote: A little progress each day adds up to big results.
Author: Satya Nani

Quote: The struggle you’re in today is developing the strength you need for tomorrow.
Author: Robert Tew
